holdings.infoBox: GRNY is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are KLA Corporation stock at 3.04%, Robinhood Markets at 2.79%, Eli Lilly and Company at 2.65%, GE Aerospace at 2.56%, and Arista Networks at 2.54%.

overview.description: The fundstrat Granny Shots US Large Cap ETF (GRNY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in 20 to 50 US large-cap securities across 5 to 10 themes determined to likely impact the economy and stock market. GRNY was launched on Nov 7, 2024 and is issued by Fundstrat.
